action.reasoning: Observation: v3 heuristic yields ~70 avg safe steps (max~106/500), 0.0 success, ~0.1 found rate, ~5m avg dist; some eps terminate early; config max_steps=750, safe [1,2)m; config inspection shows social_nav_seek_success measurement but no explicit facing printed (assume pi/6). Test ran successfully but predict.py was truncated (incomplete os.makedirs/json.dump). Analysis: P-controller loses dynamic target (random oracle moves); no obstacle avoidance leads to suboptimal paths; literature map-based SPF heuristic reaches 0.5 follow-rate but requires world-goal projection. Root cause of prior eval crash fixed (torch import present). Decision: Rewrite complete predict.py + test_full_episode.py with v4 heuristic (higher gains=1.5*err, angular=-4.0*angle, pure-rotate on |angle|>0.8, slow-follow=0.3 when detector+good_dist, backup on <0.8m); add config inspection for all social_nav_* + action specs + collision stats; run test (expect higher safe_steps), then submit_eval on fixed complete predict.py (dummy ckpt). This tunes within budget before trying SPF integration.
